digest.component_or_area: release build pipeline & Hatchling provenance hook
propositions: The release artifact is built by a different path than the CI-tested code, so the published wheel/sdist is never installed or functionally tested before publish.
The default python -m build path builds the wheel from the extracted sdist without .git, so the published wheel bakes COMMIT = None while only the sdist keeps the real SHA.
Restructure release.yml to build wheel and sdist once, record SHA-256 sums, upload one bundle, test the exact artifacts in isolated jobs, and publish the same bytes after hash verification.
Fix hatch_build.py initialize with a four-step commit precedence: REBAR_BUILD_COMMIT env var, preserve existing non-null COMMIT in _build_info.py, git rev-parse --short HEAD, else None.
The hook must fail the build only when REBAR_BUILD_COMMIT is set but empty/unresolvable, degrading gracefully to git for plain dev pip install.
Ship _build_info.py in the sdist via force_include and use short SHA format so the sdist install preserves provenance and stays consistent with signing.py's live-git value.
